name: LLM Token Based Rate Limit
description: Controls API usage by enforcing token-based rate limits for LLM APIs.

configuration.title: LLM Token Based Rate Limit
configuration.description: Controls API usage by enforcing token-based rate limits for LLM APIs.

maximumTokens.title: Maximum Tokens
maximumTokens.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed in the time period

timePeriodInMilliseconds.title: Time Period (ms)
timePeriodInMilliseconds.description: Time period in milliseconds for the rate limit window

keySelector.title: Key Selector
keySelector.description: Expression to select the key for rate limiting. Use "#[attributes.headers['ClientId']]" as rate limiter per client, "#[attributes.principal]" as rate limiter per user, "#[attributes.headers['X-Forwarded-For']]" as rate limiter per IP address.
